WILSHERE: I WANT TO BE HERE

Speaking exclusively to Sky Sports News, Jack Wilshere opened up about his Arsenal future...

"I said before I was even playing in the Premier League this is where I want to be. This is where I see myself in the future.

"Whether I will be or whether things sort themselves out we’ll see in the next couple of weeks.

"But I definitely want to be here, I’m enjoying my football and I love playing in the Premier League now and I want to help Arsenal get to where they should be.We just have to sort things out and I’m sure that will happen in the next couple of weeks and it will be sorted.

"The biggest thing for any footballer, and even more so for me because of the games missed in the past, is that you are playing. Apart from that, there’s small things to sort out but as long as I’m playing then I’m happy. I’ve missed too much football and I just want to be playing really."

【愈諗愈唔明】權威媒體公佈百大球星第41-60位：般茅前鋒位列第59位

合共公佈40位入選年度百大球星的實力戰將之外，《天空體育》再公佈第41-60位的球星，而一如預料的是，在列的20名球員當中，再出現一些讓人意外的名字，其中包括般尼茅夫前鋒祖書亞京治。

雖然現年25歲的祖書亞京治，是般尼茅夫的進攻核心，但這名挪威射手的名次，居然會高於協助車路士勇奪上屆英超冠軍的柏度？至於一眾排於61-100內的球星，像簡迪、迪基亞等人，均不比祖書亞京治出色嗎？實在讓人摸不著頭腦。

第41-60位如下：

高普讚阿仙奴無所不能

「阿仙奴是一支完整的球隊，無所不能，他們可以轉變踢法，對我們以長傳進攻，不論哪位球員上陣，都是一支強隊。我們要有最佳的防守演出，而且當有空位出現，就一定要把握。」高普（Jurgen Klopp）在周三的賽前記者會上表示。

利物浦最近踢法稍有轉變，比之前更注重防守，高普表示：「我們是一支以進攻為主的球隊，但不代表會讓對方有很多空位，球員要努力防守。老實說，這不是甚麼改變，球員要留意不同情況，不只是後衛，而是所有球員。」

或者因為防守進步，高普坦言在1月未肯定會不會簽入新後衛：「當我們守得好，我很開心，當我們守得不好，我不開心，但我不認為解決方法就是增兵。我是利迷，但不能以利迷的心態去思考。」

「蠍子王」基奧特被球迷挑機

【now.com體育】阿仙奴射手基奧特最近被球迷挑戰，要在他面前射入真正的蠍子腳入球。

基奧特（Oliver Giroud）上季英超對水晶宮的蠍子腳入球，為他贏得2017年的國際足協普斯卡斯獎。不過，有一名球迷Gile就在twitter挑戰基奧特，指其蠍子腳入球不太正宗，因為沒有雙腳都踢中皮球。

英國一家博彩公司就邀請了Gile，以及另外3名球迷，去到阿仙奴訓練場挑機，讓Gile向基奧特展示正宗的蠍子腳入球，而施治更自動請纓把關，前鋒拿卡錫迪則做觀眾。經過數次嘗試後，Gile終於成功，但其實要多得施治放水。

Gile表示：「這個挑戰比我想像中更難。說真的，基奧特真的是傳奇球員，我決定數個月都不再玩twitter！」

尾班車未完場就開 利迷點返歸？

【now.com體育】利物浦周五作客大戰阿仙奴，預計有大約3000名球迷隨愛隊南下倫敦，但當晚由倫敦直達利物浦的尾班火車，在比賽未完場前已經開出，一班利迷如何是好？

阿仙奴鬥利物浦的前列大戰在本周五上演，對於一班南下親身支持愛隊的紅軍球迷而言，這個安排實在不當。事關維珍火車宣佈將在這日罷工，部份火車服務將會受到影響，利迷們要出發前往倫敦，難度已經提高；而倫敦路面交通一向繁忙，在周五的傍晚時份就更加混亂，因此利物浦會方在官網在賽前向擁躉發出溫馨提示，呼籲他們當日提早出發。

不過，先不論比賽戰果如何，利迷們完場後心情也未必會好。皆因今場波在當時地間晚上7時45分開波，完場時間就肯定在9時30分之後；這日最後一班由倫敦直達利物浦的火車，卻早於晚上9時07分開出——即是比賽還未踢完，尾班車就已經開走了。當然，球迷們還有另一選擇，可以乘搭11時離開倫敦的班次，但中途要在曼徹斯特等候3小時，最終到翌日早上5時30分才能抵達利物浦。

既不想轉車呆等，又不想通宵駕私家車回家的，也許會選擇在倫敦逗留一晚，畢竟比賽在周五晚舉行，相信大部份人翌日都無需上班，就不必趕著北上回家。

「蠍子王」基奧特被球迷挑機

【http://now.com體育】阿仙奴射手基奧特最近被球迷挑戰，要在他面前射入真正的蠍子腳入球。

基奧特（Oliver Giroud）上季英超對水晶宮的蠍子腳入球，為他贏得2017年的國際足協普斯卡斯獎。不過，有一名球迷Gile就在twitter挑戰基奧特，指其蠍子腳入球不太正宗，因為沒有雙腳都踢中皮球。

英國一家博彩公司就邀請了Gile，以及另外3名球迷，去到阿仙奴訓練場挑機，讓Gile向基奧特展示正宗的蠍子腳入球，而施治更自動請纓把關，前鋒拿卡錫迪則做觀眾。經過數次嘗試後，Gile終於成功，但其實要多得施治放水。

Gile表示：「這個挑戰比我想像中更難。說真的，基奧特真的是傳奇球員，我決定數個月都不再玩twitter！」

Tomas Rosicky’s message to the Arsenal fans

Tomas, you’ve taken the decision to retire. How do you feel?

It’s a very difficult decision to make, because if you do something for such a long time and you love it, it’s very difficult to leave it behind you. It was very difficult but I also feel it’s the right decision. My body has been telling me for a long time that it doesn’t want to do it anymore, but the mind was always there to win, to keep playing and to keep pushing forward. We have a winter break here which lasts the whole December. I’ve been starting to prepare for spring and I just felt that I didn’t want to do this anymore. I felt now is the right time to do it. I have to deal with it now because it’s not as easy as everyone maybe thinks it is.

You’re finishing your career at Sparta Prague, where you also started out. When you look back with a bit of distance, do you think you’ll be pleased to have finished up at your boyhood club?

I think it’s a great story that I finished at a club where I basically grew up. It was the plan for me. When I knew I was leaving Arsenal, there was only one place to go so my decision was to come back or to retire. I didn’t want to do anything else. At that time, it fit the bill. I think it’s a lovely story for a very young guy from Prague who spent 16 years abroad to go back and finish the career where he started. It’s a nice story.

Of those 16 years abroad, you spent 10 at Arsenal: 246 appearances, 28 goals, two FA Cups and many memories that stick out…

Yeah, absolutely. For one last time, I would like to take this opportunity to thank everyone at Arsenal Football Club. For me, it’s a fantastic club and it was always an honour for me to play for Arsenal. I always had a special bond with the fans. Every time I played, they knew that I was playing for the shirt. I always played for the shirt because it was an honour for me to represent such a great club like Arsenal. One thing is for sure, I’m a Gunner forever.

We imagine part of the reason they loved you so much was because of your record against Tottenham. You really seemed to love playing against them and scoring against them too…

I always understood the meaning of the derby because we have a big derby here in the Czech Republic with Sparta and Slavia. Later on I played for Dortmund against Schalke, which is similar to Arsenal v Tottenham. From a very young age, I understood the meaning of the derby and that helped me as well when it came to the fans, because I was able to score some lovely goals against Tottenham.

Three goals against Tottenham, all brilliant in their own right. Have you got a favourite at all?

I have to say I very much enjoyed all of them. They were all special goals, not only because it was in a derby and meant so much to the fans, but as well because those goals were simply great goals!

During your decade here, we won the FA Cup in 2014, by which time you’d been here for eight years. You played such an important role in extra-time of that final. That must have been really special for you…

Yeah, that’s what I wanted - to win a trophy with Arsenal. There’s a regret that we didn’t win the Premier League, but after such a long time, it was a great moment. For the fans as well, the connection between the players and the fans that day was absolutely amazing. I’m repeating myself but I’ve enjoyed every minute playing for Arsenal because it’s an amazing club. I always loved to play for Arsène Wenger and for his vision of how football should be played. It was absolutely great.

雲加嘆受壓致忽視小將

【now.com體育】執教了阿仙奴21年，領隊雲加最為人津津樂道的，就是把很多小將培育成為球星。

從早年的射手安歷卡、中場法比加斯，到現時陣中的中場韋舒亞、翼鋒伊禾比，都是雲加（Arsene Wenger）在自家青訓，或是從其他球隊的青年軍一手提拔出來。他表示：「我一直很注意阿仙奴的青年軍。在近10至12年，我被逼花更多時間在一隊之上，因為傳媒現在的要求太巨大，這是我所失去的事。」

「不過，我仍然會留意，因為這是我在這份工作之中，其中一個最享受的部份，就是給予年輕球員機會。」他強調青訓的重要性。

有人成功，當然也有人失敗，雲加坦言他操縱著青年軍的生殺大權：「最終，我會決定他有機會，還是他或者不能成功。」

It is understood City think Arsenal believe keeping the former Barcelona player was a mistake and would be willing to do business next month.

However, with Guardiola's side 11 points clear at the top of the Premier League, there is a feeling bringing in Sanchez then may cause disruption.

City and Arsenal agreed a deal for the striker in the summer, but it was dependent on the Gunners replacing him.

When they were unable to sign Monaco forward Thomas Lemar, Sanchez's move was scuppered.

It is felt he still wants to work with Guardiola and, despite interest from Paris St-Germain among others, would join City at the end of the season, when he will be available on a free transfer.

With midfielder Yaya Toure's contract expiring in the summer, Guardiola would like to sign a defensive midfielder, a central defender and another attacker to take him through to the end of the 2018-19 season.

Talks have taken place over Southampton's Virgil van Dijk, while West Brom's Jonny Evans - who City were keen to sign in the summer - and Real Sociedad's Inigo Martinez are possible alternatives.
